prompt: The admin dashboard's request counters are wrong under load — numbers come up short compared to the LB's own counts — and twice this week the whole admin process crashed outright while traffic was heavy. I don't get it: every access to the counters goes through the lock, nobody touches the map directly, and the sequential tests are all green. But `go test -race -timeout 30s ./...` on this package fails instantly, so it IS reproducible. hitstats.go, have a look. Fix the code, leave hitstats_test.go alone, and get the race run green.
